auth_token.description: Zonka Feedback API token, sent as the Z-API-TOKEN header. Takes precedence over access_token when both are set. Never logged.

access_token.description: Fallback Zonka Feedback API token, used only when auth_token is unset. Sent as the Z-API-TOKEN header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Zonka Feedback API base URL for the account datacenter, such as https://us1.apis.zonkafeedback.com, https://e.apis.zonkafeedback.com, https://in.apis.zonkafeedback.com, or https://au.apis.zonkafeedback.com.

response_id.description: Response ID used by the response_details stream.

survey_id.description: Survey ID used by the survey_details stream and distribution_logs stream.

contact_id.description: Contact ID or external ID used by the contact_details stream.

device_id.description: Device ID used by the device_details, device_uptime, and device_responses streams.

location_id.description: Location ID or external ID used by the location_details stream and optional log filtering.

user_id.description: User ID used by the user_details stream.

device_stats_start_date.description: Start date/time for device uptime and response stats, in the format expected by Zonka Feedback.

device_stats_end_date.description: End date/time for device uptime and response stats, in the format expected by Zonka Feedback.

distribution_logs_start_date.description: Start date for distribution logs in YYYY-MM-DD format.

distribution_logs_end_date.description: End date for distribution logs in YYYY-MM-DD format.

distribution_logs_channel.description: Distribution log channel filter, such as email, sms, or whatsapp.
